mapper.sql: cc.code_seq, cc.code, cc.code_nm, cc.code_odr, cc.code_rmk, cc.up_code_seq, cc.del_yn

if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
cc.code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
cc.code_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_comp_code ( up_code_seq, comp_id, code, code_nm, code_rmk, code_odr, del_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{upCodeSeq}, #{compId}, #{code}, #{codeNm}, #{codeRmk}, #{codeOdr}, 'N', now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_comp_code SET up_code_seq = #{upCodeSeq}, code = #{code}, code_nm = #{codeNm}, code_rmk = #{codeRmk}, code_odr = #{codeOdr}, del_yn = #{delYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE code_seq = #{codeSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_comp_code cc WHERE cc.comp_id = #{compId}

SELECT created_at, updated_at, 'U' cmd,
FROM esg.tb_comp_code cc WHERE cc.up_code_seq = ( SELECT code_seq FROM esg.tb_comp_code WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND code = #{code} ) AND cc.del_yn = 'N'
